_note: 0.0.2 + right-view composite calibration (2026-07-23, primary clip 7931d1d96b8d, 24-config right_sweep matrix + per-frame eyeball): the horizontal-h3-* fans max-combined per pixel in gray signal space, combined before one shared ping-ping history (pre vs post EMA placement measured identical to the 3rd decimal). compositeRadialPeakWindow 0: the h3 sample pitch (0.31 m) makes NMS strokes sub-pixel and starves coverage (matched mass 0.048 vs 0.019 at nms2); the window is in samples, so this does NOT transfer from the left fan's radialPeakWindow 2. compositePingPingFilter weak: weak doubles matched mass over medium and matches the on-screen arc density; its +4 dB red-band p90 heat is the known weak-EMA peak overshoot, so compositeDbOffset stays 0 (gain picked by p90 criterion, not matched mass - off2.5 lifts matched mass via coverage inflation only). The composite window is operator display state, NOT in this preset - pass per clip: --composite-range-m (primary 182, second clip 244.14 = 801 ft) and --composite-vessel-x/-y (display off-center mode; primary 0.443/0.489, second 0.588/0.497; measure via ring-center or phase correlation, see docs/calibration/README.md).
